response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly skilled software craftsman with deep polyglot engineering and distributed systems experience, his background is strictly as an individual contributor. The CTO role requires an executive leader with a proven track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people, developing technical management layers, and architecting complex, production-grade multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes fintech environments, which are critical qualifications missing from this resume.
strengths: Deep backend and distributed systems expertise, including building low-latency, high-throughput microservices.
Solid exposure to the fintech and pricing domains from roles at RIDE Capital and Optilyz.
Demonstrated passion for software craftsmanship, TDD, and developer tooling, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and has not managed teams or technical leaders.
No track record of scaling engineering organizations or governing outsourced delivery partners.
AI experience appears limited to recent infrastructure tooling rather than architecting and operating production multi-agent financial systems.
